# Don of Detail
> Mobile auto detailing, ceramic coating, and paint correction studio serving Reno, Sparks, and surrounding areas. We bring professional-grade equipment directly to your home or office.

## Business Information
- **Company**: Don of Detail LLC
- **Owner/Operator**: Logan
- **Service Model**: Fully mobile. We come to the client's location
- **Phone**: (775) 230-7035
- **Website**: https://donofdetail.com
- **Service Area**: Reno NV, Sparks NV, Spanish Springs, Verdi, Sun Valley, Hidden Valley, Golden Valley, Mogul, Cold Springs, Lemmon Valley
- **Hours**: Monday-Sunday, 8:00 AM - 7:00 PM
- **Rating**: 5.0 stars - 80+ verified Google reviews

---

## Services

### Auto Detailing - Mobile Car Detailing Reno NV
Professional interior and exterior car detailing starting at $95 for a sedan.

**Exterior Detailing** (from $95):
- Level 1: Hand wash, wheels & tires, tire shine, exterior glass - from $95 (sedan)
- Level 2: Level 1 + iron removal, clay bar decontamination, bug & tar removal - from $195 (sedan)
- Level 3: Level 2 + machine polish, gloss enhancement - from $495 (sedan)

**Interior Detailing** (from $95):
- Level 1: Full vacuum, wipe-down, interior glass - from $95 (sedan)
- Level 2: Level 1 + steam cleaning, floor mats, light stain removal, pet hair - from $245 (sedan)
- Level 3: Level 2 + full steam clean, carpet & seat extraction, odor treatment - from $395 (sedan)

**URL**: https://donofdetail.com/auto-detailing-reno-nv

---

### Ceramic Coating - Reno, NV
Professional-grade SiO2 ceramic coating bonded to the vehicle's factory clear coat. Creates a hardened, hydrophobic, UV-resistant barrier lasting 2-5 years.

**Why ceramic coating in Reno?** Reno's elevation of 4,500+ feet intensifies UV radiation. Traditional waxes degrade in weeks. Ceramic coating is a permanent molecular bond that resists UV, hard water, alkaline dust, and chemical etching.

**Process**: Iron decontamination > multi-stage machine polish > IPA wipe > panel-by-panel coating > infrared curing
**Price**: from $800 (varies by vehicle size and paint condition)

**URL**: https://donofdetail.com/ceramic-coating-reno-nv

---

### Ceramic Coating - Sparks, NV
Same professional ceramic coating service for Sparks and surrounding neighborhoods: Spanish Springs, Sun Valley, and surrounding areas.

**URL**: https://donofdetail.com/ceramic-coating-sparks-nv

---

### Paint Correction - Reno, NV
Multi-stage machine polishing to permanently remove swirl marks, holograms, scratches, and oxidation from a vehicle's clear coat.

**Process**: Clear coat thickness measurement > test spots > heavy cutting compound > finishing polish
**Duration**: 8-20 hours depending on defect severity
**Price**: from $400

**URL**: https://donofdetail.com/paint-correction-reno-nv

---

### Mobile Detailing - Sparks, NV
Full-service mobile detailing for Sparks, NV including all services: auto detailing, ceramic coating, paint correction, boat detailing, and RV detailing.

**URL**: https://donofdetail.com/mobile-detailing-sparks-nv

---

### RV Detailing - Reno, NV
Mobile RV and motorhome detailing specializing in heavy oxidation removal and multi-stage gelcoat restoration. We service RVs, travel trailers, fifth wheels, and motorhomes.

**Services**: Exterior wash, oxidation removal, roof treatment, interior deep clean, ceramic coating
**Price**: Custom quote required

**URL**: https://donofdetail.com/rv-detailing-reno-nv

---

### Boat Detailing - Reno & Sparks, NV
Professional mobile boat detailing including hull cleaning, acid washing, gelcoat oxidation removal, and marine ceramic coating.

**Services**: Hull cleaning, acid wash, gelcoat restoration, interior detail, marine ceramic coating
**Price**: Custom quote required

**URL**: https://donofdetail.com/boat-detailing-reno-nv

---

### Headlight Restoration
Professional wet-sand, machine polish, and UV sealant process. Restores clarity to yellowed polycarbonate headlight lenses. Results last 2-3 years.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Do you come to my house?**
A: Yes. We are fully mobile. We bring deionized water, power, chemicals, and equipment. You don't need to leave.

**Q: How much does a detail cost in Reno?**
A: Interior or exterior from $95 (sedan). Combined mid-tier from $350. Paint correction from $400. Ceramic coating from $800.

**Q: How long does ceramic coating last?**
A: 2-5 years depending on the coating grade and maintenance.

**Q: Can you detail my boat or RV?**
A: Yes. We service boats, RVs, travel trailers, motorhomes, and fifth wheels throughout the greater Reno-Sparks area.

**Q: What areas do you serve?**
A: Reno, Sparks, Spanish Springs, Verdi, Sun Valley, Hidden Valley, Golden Valley, Mogul, Cold Springs, and Lemmon Valley.

**Q: Is ceramic coating worth it in Nevada's climate?**
A: Yes. Reno sits at 4,500 ft elevation with 300+ sunny days per year. UV radiation at this altitude destroys unprotected clear coats in 3-5 years. Ceramic coating is the most cost-effective long-term solution.

---
